caption: Device State Activity
description: Device State Activity events report activities related to operational state changes of a system.
name: device_state_activity

1.caption: Power On
1.description: The system was powered on and now running.

3.caption: Sleep
3.description: The system transitioned to a low-power standby state.

4.caption: Hibernate
4.description: The system state was saved to disk and power was removed.

actor.description: The actor that performed the activity on the device object.

device.description: The host or device that changed operational state.
